hero.title: Sail the Nile on a
hero.subtitle: A boutique sailing journey between Luxor and Aswan — intimate, luxurious, and utterly timeless.

why.title: Why Choose a Dahabiya?
why.subtitle: Far from the crowds of large cruise ships, a Dahabiya offers an experience unlike any other.

tranquility.title: Pure Tranquility
tranquility.desc: Glide silently on wind power, waking to peaceful river views, palm trees, and golden light.

luxury.title: Boutique Luxury
luxury.desc: Spacious cabins, personalized service, freshly prepared cuisine, and a relaxing sun deck.

authentic.title: Authentic Access
authentic.desc: Dock at hidden villages and smaller sites that large ships simply cannot reach.

slowtravel.title: Slow Travel
slowtravel.desc: No rushed schedules — absorb Egypt's beauty and history at a pace that feels truly human.

route.title: The Journey
route.subtitle: Sailing between Luxor and Aswan, two of Egypt's most historically rich cities.

quote.text: A Dahabiya Nile cruise is not just a trip — it is an experience that connects you with the soul of Egypt. Every moment feels special and unforgettable.
quote.author: Treasure Egypt Tours & Travel

gallery_teaser.title: Life on the Nile
gallery_teaser.subtitle: Glimpses of the journey that awaits you.

cta_band.title: Ready to Sail?
cta_band.subtitle: Limited cabins available. Secure your place on the Nile.

about.hero_subtitle: A vessel with centuries of history and a new era of luxury.
about.what_p1: A Dahabiya is a traditional Egyptian sailing boat that dates back to the 19th century. The name is derived from the Arabic word for gold — a reflection of the gilded grandeur these vessels once carried.
about.what_p2: Once used exclusively by royalty, diplomats, and elite explorers, the Dahabiya today provides a rare and intimate way to discover the Nile. Unlike massive cruise ships, a Dahabiya carries only a small number of guests, ensuring a deeply personal experience.

cabins.title: Spacious Cabins
cabins.desc: Each cabin is beautifully designed with private en-suite facilities, large windows framing river views, and fine Egyptian cotton linens.

deck.title: Sun Deck
deck.desc: Relax on the open upper deck as the Nile landscape unfolds — perfect for sunset cocktails or quiet morning reading.

cuisine.title: Exceptional Cuisine
cuisine.desc: Our chef prepares freshly made Egyptian and international dishes daily, using the finest local ingredients.

service.title: High Staff Ratio
service.desc: With a dedicated crew serving only a handful of guests, every request is met with warmth and promptness.

about.eco_text: A Dahabiya relies primarily on wind and sail, making it one of the most environmentally respectful ways to travel the Nile. Quieter, cleaner, and more connected to nature.

itinerary.hero_subtitle: Seven days along the world's most legendary river.

1.title: Arrival in Luxor
1.desc: Welcome aboard. Settle into your cabin, enjoy a welcome dinner, and take in your first Nile sunset from the deck.

2.title: Karnak & Luxor Temple
2.desc: Explore the colossal Karnak Temple complex and the magnificent Luxor Temple in the late afternoon light.

3.title: Valley of the Kings
3.desc: Cross the West Bank to visit the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut's Temple, and the Colossi of Memnon.

4.title: Sailing South — Hidden Villages
4.desc: A full day under sail. Stop at quiet riverside villages untouched by mass tourism and enjoy a local lunch.

5.title: Edfu Temple
5.desc: Visit the best-preserved temple in Egypt, dedicated to Horus. Marvel at towering pylons and intricate carvings.

6.title: Kom Ombo Temple
6.desc: Discover the unique double temple of Sobek and Haroeris, perched dramatically on the riverbank at sunset.

7.title: Arrival in Aswan
7.desc: Arrive in Aswan and disembark. Optional extension to Abu Simbel or the Nubian villages available.

contact.hero_subtitle: Tell us about your dream trip and we'll craft the perfect experience.

footer.tagline: Discover the Nile the way it was meant to be experienced.
